title: OIG LEIE excluded providers in NDH
headline: 8,586 of 8,767 actively-excluded LEIE NPIs (97.94%) appear in the 2026-05-08 NDH bulk export — 8,191 as Practitioner resources, 1,064 as Organization resources (9,255 total NDH appearances; some excluded individuals are listed as both a Practitioner and an Organization). Each match warrants immediate state Medicaid revalidation under 42 CFR § 455.436.
notes: LEIE source: oig.hhs.gov/exclusions/downloadables/UPDATED.csv. Total LEIE rows: 83,665; with real NPI: 8,767 (10.5%); still actively excluded: 8,767. The 89% of LEIE rows without a populated NPI (pre-NPI-era exclusions) require demographic match logic in the state MMIS — out of scope for AINPI's NPI-keyed methodology. Each match here is a data-quality flag, not a fraud determination — investigation, hearing rights, and reinstatement claims belong to the state PI unit and the OIG. The LEIE search portal at exclusions.oig.hhs.gov is the authoritative source for any individual verification.
